description: AiSDR is an AI sales rep that books meetings with personalized email, text, and LinkedIn outreach, using intent signals and HubSpot data to target prospects.
overview: AiSDR automates outbound with personalized email, text, and LinkedIn messages, drawing on many data sources and HubSpot activity to reach prospects likely to buy.
what_is: AiSDR is an AI outreach platform that automates lead generation and meeting booking. It generates highly personalized messages using a wide range of data sources, aiming at prospects who are more likely to respond and improving outreach quality.

It is strongest in outbound: building precise lead lists, reading real-time intent, and running multichannel sequences across email, LinkedIn, and text. Some teams book meetings within days of launching.

AiSDR integrates with CRMs like HubSpot and tools like Aircall to enrich workflows with live call and lead data. It complements the sales stack with research-driven outreach and scheduling rather than replacing a CRM or handling forecasting.
